raw_consumer_statement: Opened up a Barcley charge card. I never used it. Here someone charged on it. I reported fraud. Now Im trying to get a line of credit at my bank and it is in my credit report. I had it looked into. I just received a letter today that they are saying they believe I charged it. I did not. If I did I would have paid my bill. I do pay my bills. This purchase was made in XXXX. So now I will not be as XXXX get my line of credit f or a new roof. This is terrible.
